role: ETF detail fallback while StockAnalysis ETF REST endpoints are not indexed yet

overview.description: The fund seeks to achieve its investment objective primarily through managed exposure to bitcoin and ether futures contracts. Under normal circumstances, the fund will invest at least 80% of its total assets in instruments that provide exposure to bitcoin or ether or in instruments with similar economic characteristics.
